pr_reviews.highlight: execution-apis PR #814 (eth_getRawTransaction endpoints): all clients merged except ethrex (PR approved, not merged); CI spell-check failure is upstream noise — rerun to green, ready to merge
PR adding slot number to block header schema (Glamsterdam): marked for Amsterdam label; needs tests deferred until fork spec is final
PR adding 3 missing eth_getRaw* endpoints (by hash/block): all EL clients already implement these; blocked on Go Ethereum PR #35227 merge + test regeneration
Regex fix for single-byte type (PR #81415): change to allow single zero in decimal numbers is correct; uppercase hex oddity in byte type resolved — approved to merge

error_codes.highlight: New error code direction: define all new codes as strictly positive integers; positive = reliable/new, negative = legacy/fuzzy; Go Ethereum considering a legacy-mode mapper for transition period

Sina's updated proposal pending; grouping debate: user-friendly categories (gas errors, nonce errors) vs. implementation-layer categories (execution, simulation, validation); to be brought to ACD for broader input

debug_execution_witness.highlight: debug_executionWitness has no cross-client spec agreement: Geth uses JSON header with empty key; Reth/Nethermind/Erigon use RLP bytes with populated key; Geth and Reth also expose a separate by-hash method — needs spec decision

action_items.action: Merge Go Ethereum PR #35227, cut new release, regenerate execution-apis I/O tests for eth_getRaw* PR
Open a tracked issue for debug_executionWitness wire format disagreement; tag relevant stakeholders (Kev)

decisions.decision: Glamsterdam/Amsterdam spec changes without tests will use a tracking issue or long-running branch; tests backfilled once fork spec is final
Byte-type regex PR (#81415) approved to merge — restricting to lowercase aligns with all other byte types in spec
Error code rework still in progress; no merge of current PR until Sina's updated positive-number proposal is ready; broader ACD discussion planned
